title: Carrier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Carrier India is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Carrier India are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Allahabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Carrier India:
Carrier India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Carrier India!
